title: Green & White Striped Paper Straws (10mm x 200mm) - Pack Size 200 - FSC Certified/Food Safe/PFAS Free/Biodegradable/Eco-Friendly/Durable/Ideal for Milkshakes & Smoothies
features: FSC CERTIFIED – Our paper straws are made from sustainably sourced FSC certified paper, which are fully biodegradable and offers a real eco-friendly alternative to plastic straws.

UK MADE – All paper straws are manufactured at a BRCGS Packaging Materials-certified plant in Telford, Shropshire, ensuring the products supplied are quality assured, legally compliant, and authentic.
FOOD SAFE & PFAS FREE – The materials (e.g. paper, adhesive, inks) used within our paper straws are food safe and PFAS (per-and polyfluoroalkyl substances) free.

PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS – From everyday use to special celebrations, our paper straws are a great addition for a wide range of settings and events, such as bars, clubs, restaurants, outlets, weddings, parties and events.
IDEAL FOR SMOOTHIES & MILKSHAKES – Our straws deliver outstanding durability and are suitable for use with various drinks, especially smoothies and milkshakes
description: Product Description About Intrinsic Paper Straws Intrinsic Paper Straws are a dedicated manufacturer and supplier of high quality paper straws. As a member of the Mail Solutions Group, our history in providing paper products and printing solutions stems back many years. Iit is our endeavour to develop and supply paper products that are suitable alternatives to single-use plastics. Premium paper straws that you can trust Contributing towards a plastic free future Our paper straws are made from ethically sourced, food safe materials that are designed to have minimum impact on the world, oceans and wildlife. Great care is taken with every paper straw made to ensure they deliver outstanding durability across various drinks, including; water, fizzy drinks, milkshakes, smoothies, cocktails and more. Whatever the venue or occasion, our straws are perfect for use at bars, clubs, restaurants, outlets, weddings, parties and events. Ethically Sourced Made using ethically sourced paper, which provide a real alternative to plastic straws. Food Safe & PFAS Free The materials (e.g. paper, adhesive, inks) used within our paper straws are food safe and PFAS free. Durability Whether it be fizzy drinks, smoothies, milkshakes or cocktails, our paper straws are perfect for use with various beverages, offering exceptional durability. Sip In Comfort Designed to be comfortable on your lip; perfect for when sipping your favourite drink. Premium Quality Our straws can deliver outstanding drink performance, whilst giving users the enjoyment of a premium product. Reduced Impact Paper disintegrates much more quickly than plastic, thus reducing their impact on the World around us. Certifications - Intrinsic Paper Straws BRCGS Packaging Materials BRCGS Packaging Materials certification confirms that the premises, plant, systems, and procedures for Intrinsic Paper Straws (Certified by QA International Certification Ltd in 2024) independently assessed. Made In Britain Made in Britain isn’t just a label, it is a symbol of quality, pride and tradition. It was established to promote British manufacturing to bring together businesses who are committed to upholding the highest standards of craftsmanship and sustainability. ISO 14001:2015 Awarded ISO 14001:2015 certification for implementing an Environmental Management System (EMS) that meets the required global standards for identifying, measuring, and controlling our environmental impacts, such as resource consumption and waste. Reduce Plastic Straw Pollution Hundreds of millions of single-use plastic straws are used every day, which can harm the environment. If you use a straw, make sure its an Intrinsic Paper Straw.
